'''H-9PO''' was a [[Duorq]] [[79 Human-Cyborg Relations Droid]] adopted by [[H'nib Statermast]] when the previous owner was killed outside of [[Farrimmer Cafe]]. Nicknamed '''Silverhand''' by Statermast, in reference to the droid's right hand being replaced by a silver-plated one from a newer model of protocol droid. The droid was programmed to assist in gambling and was assigned to wait tables. With the tips the droid received, it aspired to [[Gambling/Legends|gamble]].<ref name="FC" />

{{Droid-stub}}
